name: HMCS Portage (J 331)
events: 24 Feb 1945 HMS Upright (Lt. J.A.L. Wilkinson, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with HMCS Smiths Falls (T/A/Lt.Cdr. P.T. Byers, RCNR) and HMCS Portage (T/Lt.Cdr. G.M. Kaizer, RCNR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
